name: Marq-Tran
content: Marquette has a bus system, but I never tried using it. During the summer, you can run all of your errands by foot or by bike, especially if you live in the downtown or university areas. Things might be more complicated in the winter. Uber and Lyft do not exist in Marquette; however, there is a taxi service. Most of the time the taxi service is a single guy in a van picking up multiple people. However, he is a pretty cool guy. If you are getting an intercity bus out of Marquette, be aware that the bus stops at the bus depot that is located 20 minutes bike ride from downtown, rather than at the transit center located on Spring Street. If you wait for an intercity bus downtown, you will be left standing there at 1 AM. I am speaking from personal experience.
